zh.lifeSummary: 當John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch於1510年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾蓋爾洛時，他的父親Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch50歲，母親Anne MacDonald26歲。他和Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1550年在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾多尼享年40歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭希倫德波奧利波奧利 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch于1510年出生在苏格兰洛-爾蓋爾洛时，他的父亲Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch50岁，母亲Anne MacDonald26岁。他和Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1550年在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾多尼享年40岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰希倫德波奧利波奧利 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch was born in 1510, in Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch, was 50 and his mother, Anne MacDonald, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm. He died in 1550, in Dornie, Cromartyshire, Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch est né en 1510, à Gairloch, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Anne MacDonald, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm. Il est décédé en 1550, à Dornie, Cromartyshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch 1510 in Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch 50 und seine Mutter Anne MacDonald 26. Er hatte mit Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1550 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Dornie, Cromartyshire, Scotland und wurde in Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch è nato il nel 1510 nel Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Anne MacDonald, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm. Morì nel 1550, nel Dornie, Cromartyshire, Scotland, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairlochが1510年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアガイルロチで生まれた時，父Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairlochは50歳，母Anne MacDonaldは26歳であった。彼はJanet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholmとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1550年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアドールニーで40歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドヒグhランドビーウリービーウリー プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 보리 보리 프리오리
ko.lifeSummary: John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch(이)가 1510년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 게어럭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne MacDonald(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 돈이에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 보리 보리 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch nasceu em 1510, em Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Anne MacDonald, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm. ru.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: болы приори, болы, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch родился в 1510 г. в местности геирлоч, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne MacDonald, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm. Он умер в 1550 г. в местности дорни, кромертишир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности болы приори, болы, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm. Murió en 1550, en Dornie, Cromartyshire, Scotland, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido.
